info.title: Intelex APIs / integrations Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Intelex publicly describes a RESTful API for building mobile apps and integrating EHSQ platform data, covering incident, audit, document, training, occupational health, and connected-worker workflows across the Intelex platform.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Intelex APIs / integrations. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Intelex's public API page states that its RESTful API allows customers to build home-grown mobile applications and integrations that take advantage of Intelex data and infrastructure. The public platform and solution pages describe API-based push and pull integration with third-party systems and list solution areas such as Document Control, Injury and Illness Management, Vehicle Incidents Management, OSHA Reports, Occupational Health Management, Industrial Hygiene exposure risk assessment, Root Cause Analysis, Meetings Management, Communications Management, and Business Intelligence. Based on the public platform description, this is a write-capable EHSQ integration surface with support for operational records and some asset or telemetry-adjacent workflows such as exposure and vehicle incident data. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
